author: DJLougen
name: MPK 8x384
blurb: Corrected 10-minute capped MPK-style multi-path causal LM with 8 layers, width 384, GQA KV4, tied embeddings, and tuned lower learning rates on 80 FineWeb SP-1024 shards. Earlier reported BPB values were invalid due to a SentencePiece leading-space accounting bug; corrected rerun with the fixed marker reached 1.3517 BPB.
